## LibraryData.IEncryptionConfig.onMissingKey property

How to handle encrypted files when the required secret is not available. - `'fail'` (default): Fail the entire load operation. - `'skip'`<!-- -->: Skip the encrypted file and continue loading other files. - `'warn'`<!-- -->: Log a warning and skip the encrypted file.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly onMissingKey?: CryptoUtils.EncryptedFileErrorMode;
```
